project.name: MCP Tools Archive
project.summary: Archived TypeScript MCP tools monorepo retained for historical source and package migration context.
goals: Preserve historical MCP package source and release context.
Direct new MCP product work to active Rust-native repositories.
Avoid reviving the deprecated TypeScript adapter monorepo as a product surface.
nonGoals: Add new MCP servers in this monorepo.
Perform an in-place Rust migration of the archive.
Use tools-adaptor-mcp as the target runtime adapter for new products.

owns.name: historical-source
owns.description: Deprecated TypeScript MCP packages and release history.

doesNotOwn: Active Reader, repository, filesystem, consultation, or Mission Control product roadmaps.
Current npm release policy for active successor products.

allowedDependencies.surface: Documentation, ADR, and MCP family governance standards

forbiddenCouplings: No active product may depend on this archived repository as its runtime strategy.
No new MCP server package may be added here.
No package README in this archive may override active product roadmaps.

delivery.productionProof: Archived repository; no production deployment target.

gaps.description: Historical packages should be mapped to active successor repositories before any capability is revived.
